name: 月神赐福
description: 为己方添加1张圣光手牌（随机：惩击/治疗/充能），并使下1张使用的圣光手牌效果+50%
code: function executeSkill(context) { const caster = context.piece; const battle = context.battle; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === caster.ownerPlayerId; }); if (!player) { return { success: false, message: '找不到玩家' }; } const cardPool = ['holy-smite', 'holy-heal', 'holy-charge']; const randomCard = cardPool[Math.floor(Math.random() * cardPool.length)]; addCardToHand(randomCard, player.playerId); if (!player.buffs) player.buffs = {}; player.buffs['elune-blessing-buff'] = { multiplier: 1.5, uses: 1 }; return { message: caster.name + '获得月神赐福，添加1张圣光手牌，下张手牌效果+50%', success: true }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '获得1张随机圣光手牌，下张手牌效果+50%', expectedValues: {} }; }
